# Asaptic Cross-Standard (asaptic.com/standard)
## LLM-friendly index of China-export compliance comparisons

Structured, source-linked comparisons of the gap between Chinese GB standards and a destination market’s MANDATORY requirements, per product × market. Trilingual EN / 简体中文 / 繁體中文.

Browse all comparisons: https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
Methodology: https://asaptic.com/standard/methodology
Provenance: data is AI-compiled and cross-checked by multiple AI models; it is NOT human-verified. Informational only — confirm every requirement with the official regulator or standards body and a qualified professional before relying on it. Not legal, certification, customs, or market-access advice.

### Comparison index (881 live comparisons · 170 destination markets · 23 product categories)
Each line links directly to its comparison page. Append /exports/<slug>.json or see llms-full.txt for machine-readable data.

#### Grid-tied PV inverter
